body: These boots handled every trail I threw at them. Ankles stayed supported on loose scree and my feet stayed dry through two stream crossings. Worth every rupee.
Solid boot, broke in faster than expected. Toe box is slightly narrow for wide feet — size up half a size.
Best hiking socks I've owned. No blisters on a 3-day trek. The cushioning on the heel is perfect.
Gaiters fit well but the velcro started peeling after a few uses. Customer support was responsive though.
